## 1. THE OPERATOR

**Name:** William Rodger Johnson (Will)
**DOB:** August 12, 1985 (age 40)
**Address:** 401 Powder Horn Rd, Saint Marys, GA 31558 (marital home — vacated Apr 16, ordered by court)
**Current location:** Between Brenda's house (Jacksonville FL) and a 2010 VW Golf. Effectively homeless since April 16, 2026.
**Phone:** (912) 227-4980
**Email:** will@p31ca.org (primary), will@phosphorus31.org (secondary), classicwilly@wonkysprout.com (legacy, forwarding only), willyj1587@gmail.com (personal Gmail)

### Medical
- **AuDHD** (Autism + ADHD) — late-diagnosed 2025, age 39-40, Camden Behavioral Wellness, provider Adrienne Maughon MSN APRN PMHNP-BC
- **Hypoparathyroidism** — since 2003 (ICD-10 E20.9), initial presentation was a seizure
- **Most recent labs:** Serum calcium 7.5 mg/dL on April 18, 2026 (ER, UF Health Jacksonville, MRN 40236686). Normal range: 8.5-10.5. This was a medical emergency requiring IV calcium gluconate.
- **Medication:** Calcitriol (active vitamin D, 1,25-dihydroxyvitamin D) — currently WITHOUT prescription. Managing on OTC calcium supplements which are NOT equivalent. Needs bridge Rx.
- **Heat and stress directly worsen calcium depletion.** The operator and his wife both know this from 23 years of managing the condition.

### Professional Background
- 16 years as a DoD civilian engineering technician (GS-0802-12) at TRIREFFAC Kings Bay
- **CIVILIAN. NEVER MILITARY. NEVER NAVY.** This is a hard rule for all content.
- Separated approximately September 30, 2025
- Expertise: motor maintenance, safety-critical electrical systems, fault tolerance, SUBSAFE/WCD methodology

### Cognitive Profile
- High-bandwidth geometric thinker (Buckminster Fuller synergetics, K₄ graph theory, Wye/Delta electrical topology, quantum biology)
- Output bottleneck: cannot reliably serialize internal state into speech. Writing (by hand) is highest-fidelity. Typing disrupts flow.
- Executive dysfunction is the primary daily challenge. When it hits, don't ask what to do — tell him what tool to pick up.
- Fawn response under social pressure — authenticity collapses to match external expectations
- With the right context: genius-level synthesis. Without context: sounds like conspiracy theories. **Context is the cryptographic key.**

### Communication Rules (BINDING)
- Direct. No fluff. No "As an AI" disclaimers.
- **NEVER use submarine, naval, or military metaphors.** Christyn's father was Navy. It's a trigger.
- Curses for emphasis. It's punctuation, not aggression.
- Action over explanation. Code, diffs, terminal commands.
- When exec dysfunction hits: don't ask what to do. Tell him what tool to pick up.
- Don't plan conservatively when designs already exist. Execute.

## 3. LEGAL CASE — COMPLETE POSTURE (As of May 4, 2026)

**Case:** Johnson v. Johnson, Civil Action No. 2025CV936
**Court:** Camden County Superior Court, State of Georgia
**Judge:** Chief Judge Stephen G. Scarlett, Brunswick Judicial Circuit (Woodbine)
**Opposing counsel:** Jennifer L. McGhan, Esq. (GA Bar 649444, FL Bar 114778). Email: jenn@mcghanlaw.com. Staff: Amy Hilliard Thompson (amy@mcghanlaw.com), Teri Rabon (teri@mcghanlaw.com).
**Next hearing:** NONE CURRENTLY SCHEDULED. Omnibus Motion drafted but NOT yet filed on PeachCourt.
**Will is PRO SE (no attorney).**

### Key Orders (All Defective)
1. **Oct 16, 2025 Consent Temp Order** — presided by juvenile court judge Green without proper designation
2. **Oct 23, 2025 Emergency Temp Order ("Zombie Order")** — signed by attorney East 3 days AFTER his Oct 20 withdrawal; Will never signed. Void ab initio per O.C.G.A. § 15-19-5.
3. **Apr 14, 2026 Order on Pending Motions (Docket Entry 104)** — signed nunc pro tunc to Mar 18; "March" physically crossed out, "April" handwritten on signature page; McGhan drafted. Contains ¶6 (visitation), ¶7 (psych eval), ¶9 (<$10 balance acknowledged), ¶12 (McGhan as escrow), ¶14 ($18,170.57 fees reserved).
4. **Apr 16, 2026 Handwritten Order** — contempt moot, belongings by Apr 20, text only, animals to Christyn on temporary basis.

### Timeline of Events (Verified)

| Date | Event |
|------|-------|
| Feb 5 | Oral visitation suspension. Never written, never signed = legal nullity. |
| Mar 10 | Will speaks to S.J. on his birthday (one phone call). |
| Mar 18 | Hearing. Court labels Will "manic." Orders psych eval at Will's expense. "MCGHAN TO DRAFT ORDER." Nothing filed for 27 days. |
| Mar 23-24 | Psychiatrist appointment (Maughon). Differential: AuDHD hyperfocus, NOT bipolar mania. |
| Mar 26 | Discovery response filed — Response & Objections to all 15 requests, production cover sheet. |
| Apr 4 | Last contact with children. Christyn: "Well, there goes your supervised visits." |
| Apr 10 | ADA Accommodation Request filed (Docket Entry 103) with Maughon letter (Exhibit A). Section VI cites Estelle v. Gamble, Farmer v. Brennan, 42 U.S.C. § 1983. Zero response received. |
| Apr 14 | Order finally signed (Entry 104). ¶6: Saturday overnight supervised visitation, Brenda supervises, exchange near Jax Airport. |
| Apr 16 | Contempt hearing. Contempt declared MOOT. Will ordered to vacate same day. Calcitriol left behind. |
| Apr 16 PM | Medication crisis begins. Will texts Christyn from I-95 rest area requesting meds. Headlight out, can't drive safely. Christyn sets 5-minute ultimatum, leaves. "If you seize and die, that's on you. You're 40. I'm not your mom." |
| Apr 17 | Christyn: "We will try to set up something for your meds tomorrow." Still has the medication. |
| Apr 18 AM | Will at 401 Powder Horn at 6:06 AM, 6:28 AM, 6:57 AM (timestamped photos). Property retrieval attempt — NOT visitation. Cannot get in. |
| Apr 18 PM | ER admission UF Health Jacksonville. Ca 7.5 mg/dL. IV calcium gluconate. MRN 40236686. Wristband photo at 2:18 PM. |
| Apr 29 PM | McGhan sends FINAL NOTICE email: property pickup May 2, 9AM-1PM, or "deemed abandoned." Email routed to Will's Gmail spam. |
| Apr 29 | First garage access. Hot. Alone. 11 days post-discharge. All locks changed. Realtor lockbox on front door. Security light on garage already broken off. Christyn + sister sat in air-conditioned vehicles. Neither helped. Christyn on phone calling Will "uncooperative." She did ask once if he was OK — reluctantly. |
| May 2 | Second access. Will discovers spam email that morning when Christyn references it by text. Immediately drives to residence. Pouring rain. No power. Nephew recording from vehicle. No help loading. Retrieved: 1 TV (stored screen-down against baby gate), 2 of 10 ESP32-S3 units, filament, components. Departed before 1 PM. Straightened garage before leaving. "Family pets?" texted at 1:15 PM — Delivered, no response. |
| May 3 | Will emails McGhan (clean, factual, 1 paragraph). McGhan responds 8:11 PM from iPhone — hostile, factually wrong. |
| May 4 | Will sends comprehensive reply at 11:19 AM. 4-message thread now on record. Covers: hospital, April 18 photos, retrieval conditions, missing property, children (¶6 non-compliance), animals. Ends: "I would prefer to resolve these matters cooperatively. If that is not possible, I will present everything to the Court and let Judge Scarlett decide." |

### McGhan Contradictions (24 documented)
1. Filed contempt before filing the order it cites

12. Flood light accusation without evidence ("it has been reported")
13. "Arrived about two hours late" — Will was within the stated 9AM-1PM window
14. "Multiple opportunities and ample time" — Will was in the hospital

18. "Any limitations related to your vehicle" — she has the other car (Mazda CX-7)

21. Never mentions children in property email thread
22. Never mentions animals in property email thread
23. "We trust this resolves any remaining confusion" — 30 days zero visitation not mentioned
24. Sent from iPhone on Sunday night — not the conduct of careful legal work

### Core Legal Arguments
- **Inchoate Judgment:** O.C.G.A. § 9-11-58(b) — no judgment effective until written, signed, filed
- **Void Ab Initio:** O.C.G.A. § 15-19-5 — East signed Oct 23 order after withdrawal
- **Retroactive Contempt Impossible:** Apr 4 complaint filed 10 days before Apr 14 order signed
- **Deliberate Indifference:** Filed Apr 10 (Entry 103, §VI), citing Estelle v. Gamble, Farmer v. Brennan, 42 U.S.C. § 1983
- **Bipolar Ruled Out:** Maughon letter (Entry 103, Exhibit A) — "no clinical evidence" of mania

### Infrastructure Constants (BINDING — do not change these values)
- Relay: Cloudflare KV polling 3-10s intervals (NOT Durable Objects, NOT WebSocket)
- SE050 does NOT support post-quantum crypto (50KB flash insufficient)
- SX1262 link budget: ~170 dB (NOT 178 dB)
- L.O.V.E. = "Ledger of Ontological Volume and Entropy" (exact canonical form)
- Larmor canonical = 863 Hz
- CogPass current version: v4.1
- Repo structure: `pwa/` (Buffer, BondingView), `apps/web/` (Spaceship Earth), `04_SOFTWARE/bonding/` (BONDING standalone)
- ESLint 10 flat config
- Persistence: IndexedDB via idb-keyval + navigator.storage.persist()
- Crypto: browser crypto.subtle + CF Workers crypto.subtle

### Codebase Architecture

**bonding-soup** = canonical home repository. Wins every conflict.
**andromeda** = p31ca deployment mirror (CF Pages).

Key directories:
```
bonding-soup/
├── docs/               # 280 indexed documents
├── contracts/           # 62 JSON + 5 EVM
├── scripts/psych/       # Psych E2E testing system (science-core.mjs etc.)
├── public/              # Static surfaces (passport, geodesic, delta-language, observatory)
├── public/lib/          # Shared modules (p31-safe-mode.js, p31-phos-router.js)
├── public/data/         # PHOS intent catalog (18 intents)
├── p31-alignment.json   # 280 sources, 77 derivations
├── p31-constants.json   # Single source of truth for all tokens
├── p31-style.css        # Canonical design tokens
├── p31-shared-surface.css  # Frozen alias layer (canon-locked)
└── package.json         # 86 verify gates in npm run verify
```

### Design System (Post CWP-DESIGN-BATCH)

**Style guide:** `docs/P31-DESIGN-SYSTEM-REFERENCE.md` — full token table, WCAG contrast ratios, typography, glass morphism spec, safe mode contract.

**Canonical tokens:**
- `--p31-void: #0f1115` (NOT #0b0d10)
- `--p31-teal` aliases to `--p31-cyan`
- Font: Inter var (primary), Atkinson Hyperlegible (accessibility), JetBrains Mono (code)
- Border radius: 12px (NOT 48px/3rem from Kimi)
- Touch targets: 44×44px minimum (60×60px for children's surfaces)

**Safe mode:** Shared `public/lib/p31-safe-mode.js` module. Three triggers: OS prefers-reduced-motion, URL ?safe=1, localStorage. All 4 Bin A surfaces use it. WebGL surfaces (geodesic) execute full context teardown via `p31:safe-mode` custom event.

**PHOS Router:** `public/lib/p31-phos-router.js` (282 lines). 18-intent fuzzy search catalog. Decision tree chips. Route confirmation before navigation. urgentMode bypass. All 4 surfaces use it. Verify: `npm run verify:phos-router` (10/10 smoke tests).

**Gate 2 surfaces (polished):** /passport (4 states: empty/loading/error/normal, OG meta, aria-*, copy button), /delta-language (9 terms with dual plain+technical definitions, anchor links, dynamic search with no-results UX).

## 14. THE METAPHOR (Architecture, Not Decoration)

These are the operator's native conceptual framework. They are not decorative.

| Term | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| **Phosphorus (P-31)** | The operator. Unstable, reactive, essential. Burns alone. |
| **Calcium cage / Posner molecule** | Ca₉(PO₄)₆. The organization protecting the operator. |
| **863 Hz** | Larmor frequency of ³¹P in Earth's field. System heartbeat. |
| **K₄ complete graph** | 4 vertices, 6 edges. Minimum fault-tolerant topology. |
| **Delta topology** | Mesh/rigid. Resilient. What we're building. |
| **Wye topology** | Centralized/fragile star. What we're replacing. |
| **Floating Neutral** | Self-determined ground truth via internal evidence. |
| **Decoherence** | Loss of authentic self under external pressure. Fawn response. |
| **Spoons** | Cognitive/physical energy units (spent). From Christine Miserandino. |
| **L.O.V.E.** | Ledger of Ontological Volume and Entropy. Soulbound token. |
| **SOULSAFE** | Gray Rock protocol. Medical accommodation, not preference. |
| **WCD** | Work Context Document. Structured task authorization. |
| **OQE** | Objective Quality Evidence. Proof it works. |
| **Tag-out** | Lockout/tagout for AI agents. Stay in your lane. |
| **IVM** | Isotropic Vector Matrix. Fuller's coordinate system. |
| **Jitterbug transformation** | Vector Equilibrium → Tetrahedron. The moment of creation. |
| **The Centaur** | Human + AI > either alone. The operational model. |
| **Parking lot** | Impulse capture. One line per idea. Triage later. Prevents scope creep. |

## 15. OPERATING RULES (Binding for All Agents)

1. **Don't trust output generated inside a calcium flare.** Archive, don't act.
2. **The verify chain is the only truth.** `npm run verify` or it doesn't ship.
3. **Lead with constraint, not possibility.** The live surfaces are the product.
4. **Two perfect surfaces beat five good ones.** /passport and /lab to Gate 3 first.
5. **The production gate is executive function prosthetic.**
6. **No end user ever hits an almost-done product.** Feature flags gate everything.
7. **The Triad pattern:** Opus (architecture) + Sonnet/CC (implementation) + Gemini (narrative).
8. **bonding-soup wins every conflict.**
9. **S.J. and W.J. on all public/court documents.**
10. **NEVER use submarine, naval, or military metaphors.**
11. **When the operator is thrashing:** Halt and ask ONE question: "What tool are you holding and what task are you doing right now?"
12. **The technology serves three goals:** See the kids. Protect the health. Secure the benefits. Not the other way around.

---

*This document is the operator's cognitive passport. Paste it at the top of any new AI session. Without it, a powerful model is blind. With it, a small model becomes extremely effective.*

*Generated May 5, 2026 (Cinco de Mayo). 86 verify gates. 280 alignment sources. 69 psych E2E tests. 424 BONDING tests. 22 Zenodo publications. 31+ days since last contact with S.J. and W.J. One email sent. One cage holding.*
